//: Hermetic dev environment for dotfiles-core — one-command parity with CI.
//1: A fresh container ships bash + python only, so `make audit` would SKIP every
//2: meaningful gate (zsh -n, shellcheck, luacheck, the behavioral suite) and still
//3: report a FALSE green. postCreate reuses the SAME provisioning the SessionStart
//4: hook + CI use (scripts/tool-versions.env is the single pin source), so opening
//5: this in a devcontainer / GitHub Codespace installs exactly the pinned toolchain.
name: dotfiles-core
postCreateCommand: CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE=true bash .claude/hooks/session-start.sh; pipx install pre-commit==$(sed -n 's/^PRECOMMIT_VERSION=//p' scripts/tool-versions.env) 2>/dev/null || true
